xlibs is a shared library. If you hit this bug while using AlifePlus, AlifeGuard, or Diegetic Audio Control, please file the report on that mod's tracker first -- they will reroute here if it turns out to be xlibs.

- xlibs:
- Consumer mod (AlifePlus / AlifeGuard / Diegetic / other):
- Anomaly: 1.5.3 (Modded exes y/n)
- GAMMA / standalone:

## Log (REQUIRED)

Attach `D:\Anomaly\appdata\logs\xray_<user>.log` and the consumer mod's log
(`alifeplus.log` / `alifeguard.log` / `diegetic.log`).

xlibs has no own log file or debug toggle. If your consumer mod has a debug toggle,
enable it (MCM -> that mod -> `log_level = DEBUG` or `debug_mode`), reproduce, then attach.

## Screenshots / video (optional)
Drag images or short clips into this box.
